fields.label: Supplier Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sSupplierName1 FROM tblSupplier ORDER BY sSupplierName1

fields.label: Contact
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(sContactFirst,'') + ' ' + ISNULL(sContactLast,''))) AS Contact FROM tblSupplier ORDER BY sSupplierName1

fields.label: Phone
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sPhoneVoice FROM tblSupplier ORDER BY sSupplierName1

fields.label: Email
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sContactEMail FROM tblSupplier ORDER BY sSupplierName1

fields.label: Active
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bActive, 0) AS Active FROM tblSupplier ORDER BY sSupplierName1
